mapper.sql: c.id, c.group_id, c.parent_id, c.depth, c.code, c.code_name, c.code_value, c.sort_order, c.is_active, c.is_system, c.start_at, c.end_at, c.created_at, c.created_by, c.updated_at, c.updated_by, c.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , g.group_code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code ch WHERE ch.parent_id = c.id AND ch.deleted = 0) AS child_count FROM common_code c JOIN common_code_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 WHERE c.group_id = #{groupId} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.code ASC

SELECT , g.group_code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code ch WHERE ch.parent_id = c.id AND ch.deleted = 0) AS child_count FROM common_code c JOIN common_code_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 WHERE c.group_id = #{groupId} AND (c.parent_id IS NULL OR c.parent_id = 0) AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.code ASC

SELECT , g.group_code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code ch WHERE ch.parent_id = c.id AND ch.deleted = 0) AS child_count FROM common_code c JOIN common_code_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.code ASC

SELECT , g.group_code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code ch WHERE ch.parent_id = c.id AND ch.deleted = 0) AS child_count FROM common_code c JOIN common_code_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_code ( group_id, parent_id, depth, code, code_name, code_value, sort_order, is_active, is_system, start_at, end_at, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{groupId}, #{parentId}, IFNULL(#{depth}, 1), #{code}, #{codeName}, #{codeValue}, IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0), IFNULL(#{isActive}, 1), IFNULL(#{isSystem}, 0), #{startAt}, #{endAt}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE common_code SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT , g.group_code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code ch WHERE ch.parent_id = c.id AND ch.deleted = 0) AS child_count FROM common_code c JOIN common_code_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 WHERE g.group_code = #{groupCode} AND g.deleted = 0 AND g.is_active = 1 AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.is_active = 1 AND (c.start_at IS NULL OR c.start_at <= NOW()) AND (c.end_at IS NULL OR c.end_at >= NOW()) ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.code ASC
